title: Theone's NextGen Pack
description: Resourcepack changes vanilla textures to nextgen theme + animations!
body:
![line2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed079e50b76a3d65d0cb5845f9af3b0ae2649e9e.png)
Participant in Forge the Future: Minecraft ModJam 2025
![line1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f1e5d3f8606b2d9406a8c6db7075a3fe17816f4.png)
Some textures have been changed to nextgen themes.
Some have not been changed to nextgen, but changed to my liking :) ![textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edd2ed96acb0ce7911feda671a9818e1136dd4da.png) **
All current textures** ![line3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f34a5d2bf89f0ca35a9dbc44afc3524f9efb8737.png)
All metalic tools have animation when you take it in your hand ![show1](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1350944/description_7b830116-6ea4-40cd-81a9-89cab2a6de48.gif) ![show2](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1350944/description_ece50a32-32eb-441c-9520-3f0d9cfc3875.gif) ![line1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f1e5d3f8606b2d9406a8c6db7075a3fe17816f4.png)
